expectations.text: Recommends a separate BillingDbContext owned by the Billing module (does NOT recommend sharing/extending the host's existing DbContext)
expectations.evidence: each module owns its own DbContext, its own Migrations folder, and its own __EFMigrationsHistory_<Module> table. Sharing a DbContext across modules destroys module isolation; section 'Warning: do NOT share a DbContext across modules'.

expectations.text: Specifies a unique EF Core migrations history table for this module — explicitly something like __EFMigrationsHistory_Billing — and explains why (avoid EF treating other modules' migrations as missing)
expectations.evidence: b.MigrationsHistoryTable("__EFMigrationsHistory_Billing", BillingDbProperties.DbSchema)... If you reused the default __EFMigrationsHistory, EF would think this module's migrations are 'missing' and try to re-apply them.

expectations.text: Includes an IDesignTimeDbContextFactory<BillingDbContext> implementation alongside the DbContext, explaining it's needed for `dotnet ef migrations add` (or equivalent)
expectations.evidence: public class BillingDbContextFactory : IDesignTimeDbContextFactory<BillingDbContext>... Required so dotnet ef migrations add works from the EF Core project without spinning up the Host.

expectations.text: Includes a per-module schema migrator: an IBillingDbSchemaMigrator interface and an EntityFrameworkCoreBillingDbSchemaMigrator (or equivalently named) implementation that runs migrations on the module's DbContext
expectations.evidence: public interface IBillingDbSchemaMigrator { Task MigrateAsync(); } and class EntityFrameworkCoreBillingDbSchemaMigrator : IBillingDbSchemaMigrator, ITransientDependency that calls BillingDbContext.Database.MigrateAsync().

expectations.text: Wires the DbContext with the PostgreSQL provider (UseNpgsql) — i.e. the answer is template-aware about Postgres, not a generic SQL Server example
expectations.evidence: c.UseNpgsql(b => { b.MigrationsHistoryTable(...); b.MigrationsAssembly(...); }); AbpEntityFrameworkCorePostgreSqlModule dependency; uses numeric(18,2).
